case_title: MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS, INC. VS. BENJAMIN H. REALTY CORP. et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS, INC.
